name: Basic Ff Granola
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the ingredients in a large bowl.
2. Spread the mixture into a jelly-roll type pan.
3. Bake at 250°F for about an hour, stirring occasionally.
4. Pour the warm granola back into the mixing bowl and gently fold in dried fruit.
5. Allow to cool before storing in an airtight container.
Note: You can easily modify this recipe by substituting or adding honey, nutmeg, maple syrup, Smuckers syrup, amaranth seeds, oat bran, rye flakes, craisins, or dried apricots. Granola is not fat-free; oats contain about 15% oil, so consume in moderation.
